reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio YPF, tiene Serviclub y descuento a socios 5%. Está muy bien ubicada en el centro de Neuquén, suele haber cola de tres o cuatro autos en cada isla, se demora un poco en cargar. Tiene una playa de estacionamiento paga. ($45 por hora al socio ACA), la cafetería no tiene aire acondicionado, evitar en verano.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF gas station has a Serviclub membership program and a 5% discount for members. It's very well located in downtown Neuquén, but there's usually a line of three or four cars at each pump, and filling up takes a bit of a while. It has a paid parking lot ($45 per hour for ACA members). The cafeteria doesn't have air conditioning, so avoid it in the summer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbGZPMkJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
